appraisal_events.evidence: « cela vous ennuierait-il que nous nous tutoyions ? » — « ... joie ! pleurs de joie ! félicité inconnue ! » ... « le tutoiement me suffit. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The passage culminates in mutually accepted tutoiement, framed as a highly valued intimacy; Saint-Loup’s exuberant consent marks a local elevation of their bond.

status_effects.explanation: He is included in a more intimate, valued register with the narrator through tutoiement, affirmed with joyful acceptance.
